swissarmyhammer-common/src/parameter_conditions.rs:166-461

Uncovered lines: 166-168, 186-188, 197-200, 212, 215, 217-220, 223, 229-231, 242-244, 255, 307-309, 319, 325, 330, 397, 418-419, 424-426, 429, 442, 454, 460-461

Key uncovered areas:

Focus on testing nested condition groups (AND with OR children), the string match operators (Contains, StartsWith, EndsWith), and round-trip serialization of condition structures.
